entry.title: IDC N0003915D0008 (P00001) awarded to VIASAT, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MULTIFUNCTIONAL INFORMATION DISTRIBUTION SYSTEM (MIDS) JOINT TACTICAL RADIO SYSTEM (JTRS). THE PURPOSE OF THIS BI-LATERAL MODIFICATION IS TO 1) VIASAT'S PRICING STRUCTURE TO SECTION B-1 (TABLES A THROUGH E) DATED 27 JULY 2015 IS HEREBY INCLUDED BY REFERENCE; 2) UPDATE ATTACHMENT A - PRODUCTION STATEMENT OF WORK; 3) UPDATE CDRL A00L; AND 4) ADD CDRL A00N.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: RADIO AND TELEVISION COMMUNICATION EQUIPMENT, AIRBORNE

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: RADIO AND TELEVISION BROADCASTING AND WIRELESS COMMUNICATIONS EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC N0003915D0008 (P00002) awarded to VIASAT, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MULTIFUNCTIONAL INFORMATION INFORMATION DISTRIBUTION SYSTEM (MIDS) JOINT TACTICAL RADIO SYSTEM (JTRS). THE PURPOSE OF THIS BI-LATERAL MODIFICATION IS (1) REALIGN CEILING FROM CLIN 0005 TO CLIN 0007; (2) TO UPDATE CDRL B00Y.
